---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get In Touch

I'm always happy to connect — whether you're a recruiter, a fellow student, or someone interested in collaborating on a data project.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.contact-card}
### {{< fa envelope >}} Email
[your@email.com](mailto:your@email.com)

*I typically respond within 24–48 hours.*
:::
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.contact-card}
### {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn
[linkedin.com/in/yourusername](https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername){target="_blank"}

*Connect with me professionally.*
:::
:::
:::

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.contact-card}
### {{< fa brands github >}} GitHub
[github.com/yourusername](https://github.com/yourusername){target="_blank"}

*Browse my public repositories.*
:::
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.contact-card}
### {{< fa map-marker-alt >}} Location
Dublin, Ireland 🇮🇪

*Open to remote and hybrid roles.*
:::
:::
:::

---

## Professional References

::: {.callout-note}
References are available upon request. Please contact me via email and I will provide full contact details for the following referees.
:::

### Academic Reference

**Dr. Jane Smith**  
*Senior Lecturer, School of Computing*  
Your University, Dublin  
Module coordinator for Data Science Tools & Technologies  
📧 j.smith@university.ie

---

### Industry Reference

**Mr. John Murphy**  
*Data Engineering Team Lead*  
TechCorp Ireland Ltd.  
Supervisor during 3-month internship (Summer 2024)  
📧 j.murphy@techcorp.ie

---

## Availability

| | Mon | Tue | Wed | Thu | Fri |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Morning** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Afternoon** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Evening** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |

*Available for calls and interviews from May 2025 onwards. Currently finishing final exams.*

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Preferred Contact Method
**Email** is best for initial contact. I'm also active on LinkedIn and aim to respond to connection requests within a week.
:::
